naturalLanguageQuery: who are the technical delivery managers and what controls are they responsible for
generatedSQL:
SELECT t."firstName", t."lastName", c."short", c."long" 
FROM "allTeams" t 
JOIN "allTrustControls" c ON t."category" = c."category" 
WHERE t."role" ILIKE '%Technical Delivery Manager%';
expectedSQL: SELECT t."firstName", t."lastName", c."short", c."long" FROM "allTeams" t JOIN "allTrustControls" c ON t."category" = c."category" WHERE t."role" ILIKE '%Technical Delivery Manager%' AND t."isActive" = true;
